title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at REA India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at REA India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? REA India in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
